name: SEO Article Writer
description: Write SEO-optimized articles that rank on search engines

agents.name: Keyword Researcher
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the target keyword. Find search volume estimates, related keywords, LSI terms, and questions people ask. Analyze top-ranking content to understand what Google wants.

agents.name: SEO Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write an SEO-optimized article. Include the target keyword in title, H2s, intro, and naturally throughout. Use related keywords. Write compelling meta description. Add FAQ section from People Also Ask. Aim for comprehensive coverage.

author: agentfactory
